item.title: Lemonade’s Sweet Results Refresh Market Appetite: Rebound Ahead
item.description: Lemonade's AI-driven insurance platform delivers value to its users. This company has an accelerating flywheel and a clearer timeline to profitability...

item.title: PayPal Is Back Near IPO-Era Prices—Value Setup or Value Trap?
item.description: PayPal P/E ratio and stock are both at decade-lows. However, while skepticism is justified, the risk/reward profile is increasingly hard to ignore.

item.title: Beyond the Box: How FedEx Is Winning as Tech Slumps
item.description: Wall Street is rotating into FedEx as the logistics giant hits record highs, driven by a corporate restructuring and a planned spin-off of its freight...

item.title: Nebius’ AI Infrastructure Rally Is Back—And the Numbers Explain Why
item.description: Nebius jumped after Q4 results despite a revenue miss. See ARR and power targets, pricing strength, analyst upgrades, and the key breakout levels to w...

item.title: Magic Mushrooms, Hard Cash: Compass Pathways’ Trial Win, Fast Raise
item.description: See what Compass Pathways’ Phase 3 COMP360 TRD data showed, why the stock jumped, and how a discounted offering reshapes the near-term setup.
